# Postmortems

## Purpose
Use this skill after incidents to document causes, impacts, and prevention actions.

## Triggers
- "write postmortem"
- "5 whys"
- "corrective actions"

## Outputs
- Incident narrative
- Root and contributing factors
- Corrective actions with owners
- Follow-up verification plan

## Example Prompts
- "Draft a blameless postmortem from this incident timeline and evidence."
- "Run a 5-whys analysis and produce actionable follow-ups with owners."
